title: capraria verticillata
intro: Capraria verticillata, also known as Herbe à la folie or False Pennyroyal, is a plant species native to Europe, North Africa, and parts of Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as an antispasmodic, carminative, and expectorant. The health benefits of Capraria verticillata include its potential to alleviate digestive issues, respiratory problems, and menstrual cramps, as well as its ability to act as a natural insect repellent. Capraria verticillata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is sometimes used in combination with other herbs for its medicinal properties.
